mapper.insert: insert into version( id, name, region, generation ) values( #{id}, #{name}, #{region}, #{generation} )
INSERT INTO type( id, name, generation, sprite ) VALUES( #{id}, #{name}, #{generation}, #{sprite} )
INSERT INTO type_efficacy( damage_type_id, target_type_id, damage_factor ) VALUES( #{damageTypeId}, #{targetTypeId}, #{damageFactor} )
INSERT INTO egg_group( id, name ) VALUES( #{id}, #{name} )
INSERT INTO ability( id, name, description, generation, is_main_series ) VALUES( #{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{generation}, #{isMainSeries} )
INSERT INTO pokemon_ability_map( pokemon_id, ability_id, slot, is_hidden ) VALUES( #{pokemonId}, #{abilityId}, #{slot}, #{isHidden} )
INSERT INTO pokemon_sprite( pokemon_id, sprite_shiny_url, artwork_shiny_url ) VALUES( #{pokemonId}, #{spriteShinyUrl}, #{artworkShinyUrl} )
INSERT INTO pokemon_type_map( pokemon_id, type_id, slot ) VALUES( #{pokemonId}, #{typeId}, #{slot} )

INSERT INTO pokemon_species( id, name, sort_order, gender_rate, is_baby, is_legendary, is_mythical, category, generation ) VALUES( #{id}, #{name}, #{sortOrder}, #{genderRate}, #{isBaby}, #{isLegendary}, #{isMythical}, #{category}, #{generation} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = id
INSERT INTO pokemon_description( version_id, pokemon_species_id, description ) VALUES( #{versionId}, #{pokemonSpeciesId}, #{description} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = id
INSERT INTO pokemon_species_egg_group_map( egg_group_id, pokemon_species_id ) VALUES( #{eggGroupId}, #{pokemonSpeciesId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = id

INSERT INTO pokemon( id, pokemon_species_id, sort_order, name, main_artwork_url, main_sprite_url, cries, height, weight, hp, attack, defense, special_attack, special_defense, speed, is_default ) VALUES( #{id}, #{pokemonSpeciesId}, #{sortOrder}, #{name}, #{mainArtworkUrl}, #{mainSpriteUrl}, #{cries}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{hp}, #{attack}, #{defense}, #{specialAttack}, #{specialDefense}, #{speed}, #{isDefault} )
